creators.name: Pillai, Bharath
creators.affiliation: Imageomics Institute, The Ohio State University

description: A Python toolkit for estimating animal GPS coordinates from camera-trap imagery using known camera position, bearing, and pinhole geometric projection. Supports YOLO and YOLO+SAHI detection backends, and BioCLIP 2 classification via either pybioclip (full Tree-of-Life taxonomy) or open_clip (zero-shot label list).
title: camera-trap-geolocation: GPS forward projection for camera-trap detections
references: Gu, J., Stevens, S., Campolongo, E. G., Thompson, M. J., Zhang, N., Wu, J., Kopanev, A., Mai, Z., White, A. E., Balhoff, J., Dahdul, W., Rubenstein, D., Lapp, H., Berger-Wolf, T., Chao, W.-L., & Su, Y. (2025). BioCLIP 2: Emergent properties from scaling hierarchical contrastive learning. arXiv:2505.23883.

Kline, J., Potlapally, A., Pillai, B., Wani, T., Katole, R., Patil, V., Covey, P., Subramoni, H., Berger-Wolf, T., & Stewart, C. (2025). SmartWilds: Multimodal wildlife monitoring dataset. arXiv:2509.18894.
